title: sida hederifolia
intro: Sida hederifolia, also known as country mallow or billygoat plum, is a flowering plant native to Australia, Asia, and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sida hederifolia include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Sida hederifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
